summary: Frontend testing of 6 bug fixes for daily activity app (mobile-first, localStorage). All 9 test scenarios passed successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: KegiatanItem delete button is always shown including for Apel Pagi - correct behavior
isNoApelPagiDay correctly covers Fri(5), Sat(6), Sun(0)
seed_data_creation: Used localStorage via browser for test data, cleared between test runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 bug fixes verified working: (1) Apel Pagi hidden on Fri/Sat/Sun, (2) Salin Hari Sebelumnya appears when prev day has data, (3) Apel Pagi deletable via Hapus button in KegiatanItem, (4) Hapus Semua with confirm dialog works, (5) Save error shown for Apel Pagi only, (6) Card collapses + Kegiatan Tersimpan after save, (7) PDF warning with Buka Pengaturan navigates to settings tab. App uses mobile viewport 390x844.

test_results_detail.T1_apel_pagi_senin: PASS - Apel Pagi button visible on 2026-06-01 (Monday)
test_results_detail.T2_apel_pagi_jumat: PASS - Apel Pagi button NOT visible on 2026-06-05 (Friday)
test_results_detail.T3_apel_pagi_sabtu: PASS - Apel Pagi button NOT visible on 2026-06-06 (Saturday)
test_results_detail.T4_copy_prev_day: PASS - Salin Hari Sebelumnya button visible on Tuesday after Monday saved
test_results_detail.T5_apel_pagi_delete: PASS - Apel Pagi item deleted via delete-activity-btn, empty state shown
test_results_detail.T6_hapus_semua: PASS - Delete All button visible, confirm dialog appears, all deleted
test_results_detail.T7_save_error_apel_pagi_only: PASS - Error 'Harap isi minimal 1 kegiatan kerja selain Apel Pagi' shown
test_results_detail.T8_card_collapse_saved_state: PASS - Card collapses after save, 'Kegiatan Tersimpan' shown on re-expand
test_results_detail.T9_pdf_warning_settings: PASS - PDF button inactive, warning with Buka Pengaturan navigates to settings tab
